apihelp-collection+getcollection-example: Liiska bogagga hadda ku jira ururinta.
apihelp-collection+getcollection-summary: API module ee lagu taxayo bogagga hadda ku jira ururinta
apihelp-collection+addarticle-summary: API module ee lagu darayo bog ururinta
apihelp-collection+settitles-example: Deji cinwaanka iyo cinwaan hoosaadka ururinta
apihelp-collection+settitles-settings-ex: Deji cinwaanka, cinwaan-hoosaadka, iyo dejimaha ururinta
apihelp-collection+settitles-summary: API module ee lagu dejinayo cinwaanka, cinwaan-hoosaadka, iyo dejimaha ururinta
coll-api-addarticle-article-not-added: Bogga laguma darin ururinta. Hubi in cinwaanku ku jiro magacaabista la cayimay ama hubi in boggu hore ugu jiro ururinta.
apihelp-collection+removearticle-summary: API module ee lagu saarayo bog ururinta
coll-api-removearticle-article-not-remov: Bogga lagama saarin ururinta. Hubi in cinwaanku ku jiro magacaabista la cayimay ama hubi in boggu aanu ku jirin ururinta.
apihelp-collection+addcategory-example: Ku dar bogag ka tirsan qayb la cayimay ururinta isticmaalaha.
apihelp-collection+addcategory-summary: API module ee lagu darayo bogagga ka tirsan qayb la cayimay ururinta isticmaalaha.
apihelp-collection+suggestarticleaction-: Waxay bog ku dartaa ururinta iyo talooyinka
API module ee lagula falgalayo talooyinka

Mid ka mid ah 'add', 'remove', ama 'ban'. 'add' waxay bog ku dartaa ururinta iyo talooyinka waxayna ka qaaddaa xannibaadda. 'remove' waxay ka saartaa bogga lagu daray waxayna xannibtaa. 'ban' waxay bogga ka xannibtaa talooyinka.
apihelp-collection+suggestundoarticleact: Waxay dib uga noqotaa tallaabada bogga lagu daray
Qaybta API ee lagu soo celinayo tallaabooyinka laga sameeyay suggestarticleaction
coll-api-addcategory-category-does-not-e: Qaybta aad isku dayayso inaad bogag ka soo darto ma jirto, ma saxna, ama waxay leedahay bogag ka badan xadka la cayimay.
apihelp-collection+addchapter-summary: API module ee lagu darayo cutub ururinta
apihelp-collection+renamechapter-example: Dib ugu magacow cutub ku jira ururinta isticmaalaha.
apihelp-collection+renamechapter-summary: API module ee dib loogu magacaabayo cutub ku jira ururinta isticmaalaha
apihelp-collection+clearcollection-summa: API module ee lagu nadiifinayo ururinta iyo talooyinka
apihelp-collection+setsorting-example: Ururin ka kooban 3 shay, isweydaari shayga koowaad iyo kan labaad
apihelp-collection+setsorting-deletion-e: Ururin ka kooban 3 shay, ka dhig shayga 3aad kan koowaad, oo tirtir shayga 2aad
apihelp-collection+setsorting-summary: API module ee dib loogu kala hagaajinayo walxaha ku jira ururinta
apihelp-collection+setsorting-param-item: Walxaha waa in lagu taxaa iyadoo la adeegsanayo tusmooyinkoodii hore, waxaana loo kala hormariyaa boosaskooda cusub
apihelp-collection+sortitems-example: U kala saar bogagga ururinta sida alifbeetada ah
apihelp-collection+sortitems-summary: API module ee lagu kala saarayo bogagga ururinta sida alifbeetada ah. Bogagga ku jira cutubyada waa la isu geeyaa oo si wadajir ah ayaa loo kala saaraa.
apihelp-collection+getpopupdata-example: Waxay soo bandhigtaa daaqad yar oo lagu daro bog ururinta ama looga saaro
apihelp-collection+getpopupdata-summary: API module ee lagu helayo xogta iyo HTML lagu dhisayo daaqad yar
apihelp-collection+removeitem-example: Ka saar shay ururinta adigoo bixinaya tusmo ama isticmaalaya tusmada 0 sida caadiga ah.
apihelp-collection+removeitem-summary: API module ee lagu saarayo shay ururinta iyadoo loo marayo tusmada bogga Special:Book.
apihelp-collection-param-submodule: Qayb hoosaad loogu talagalay fulinta hawlgallo kala duwan oo ku saabsan ururinta isticmaalaha wiki-ga.
apihelp-collection-summary: API module ee loogu talagalay fulinta hawlgallo kala duwan oo ku saabsan ururinta isticmaalaha wiki-ga.
apihelp-collection+getbookcreatorboxcont: Hel nuxurka sanduuqa abuuraha buugga ee ururinta isticmaalaha.
Qayb hoosaadka API ee lagu soo qaadayo nuxurka sanduuqa abuuraha buugga ee bogga gaarka ah ee isticmaalaha.
apihelp-collection+postcollection-summar: API module ee lagu dhajinayo bogagga ururinta isticmaalaha
coll-api-invalid-collection: Waxaa la helay ururin aan sax ahayn.
